author: Krystal Scanlon
title: OpenAI expands ads manager to U.K., adds CPC
description: Similar to the U.S. the ads manager is now widely available in the U.K., and is the fifth market where advertisers can access it.
content: Just six weeks after OpenAI’s ads manager was made widely available in the U.S., the AI company has now expanded the product to the U.K., in beta.The move makes the U.K. the fifth market with access … [+2650 chars]
